mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tb_employee_performance_task
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT id FROM tb_employee_performance_task WHERE confirm_deadline_time < NOW() AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id FROM tb_employee_performance_task WHERE second_confirm_deadline_time IS NOT NULL AND second_confirm_deadline_time < NOW() AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_employee_performance_task (performance_description, period_start_date, period_end_date, confirm_deadline_time, second_confirm_deadline_time, status, total_count, confirmed_count, feedback_count, auto_confirmed_count, create_admin_id, create_admin_name, is_deleted) VALUES (#{performanceDescription}, #{periodStartDate}, #{periodEndDate}, #{confirmDeadlineTime}, #{secondConfirmDeadlineTime}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{confirmedCount}, #{feedbackCount}, #{autoConfirmedCount}, #{createAdminId}, #{createAdminName}, #{isDeleted})
